title: Vanilla Enriched
description: A vanilla-friendly collection of resource packs and mods designed to enhance gameplay and breathe life into your Minecraft world—without changing its core essence, while staying up to date with the latest release version of Minecraft.
body:
**This modpack was made for anyone who wants vanilla Minecraft to feel a bit more alive** — not by changing how the game plays, but through small visual improvements. Things like **better textures, subtle details, and tweaks** that make the world look a little more polished and atmospheric.

On top of the visual stuff, it also includes a few **optimization mods** to help the game run smoother, along with some simple **quality-of-life mods** to make things like inventory management and tooltips more accessible.

**Nothing here adds new content or changes the core mechanics** — it’s still 100% vanilla at heart. Just a little better looking, a little smoother, and a little easier to play.

If you want your Minecraft to look nicer, run better, and feel a bit more refined, without losing that classic vanilla charm, this pack is exactly that.

**Still vanilla. Just nicer to play.**

I have no previous experience with modpack-making, so any issues or suggestions are welcome!

My discord: **SirPato**

The **"VanillaTweaks_Lower Shield, HD Shield Banner Patterns"** resource pack is from the Unobtrusive and Aesthetic section of https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/.

All credit for the other mods and resource packs used in this modpack goes to their respective creators. :D
